page: Microsoft Azure F80amds_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famdsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 80 dedicated physical cores and 80 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor using the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 640.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and is bundled with 9449 GB of local storage. The CPU includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, AVX_VNNI, and cryptographic acceleration via AES and SHA_NI.

In benchmark evaluations, the F80amds_v7 demonstrates top-tier performance across multiple categories. The AMD EPYC processor achieves top 10% placement in both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests, as well as PassMark CPU and database operations. Memory performance is highly competitive, with read-only and write large-block memory bandwidth tests ranking in the top 10%, complemented by a strong top 25% PassMark memory score. The system also excels in data processing, showing top-tier throughput in Redis SET operations, static web serving, and bzip3 decompression.

For language model workloads, the server delivers top-tier text generation speeds for medium-sized (7B) models and strong performance for large (70B) models, though text generation for smaller models falls into the average tier. Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio, massive local storage capacity, and exceptional database benchmark results, the F80amds_v7 is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, large-scale data processing, Redis deployments, and enterprise-grade web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure F80amds_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine within the Famdsv7 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 80 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, 640.0 GB of RAM, and 9449 GB of local storage. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and cryptographic accelerators. In benchmark testing, the server achieves top-tier results in single-core and multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and memory bandwidth. It also demonstrates strong capabilities in Redis operations and medium-to-large LLM inference tasks. This hardware profile offers a resource-dense configuration for memory-heavy workloads. The F80amds_v7 is optimized for memory-intensive databases, large-scale data processing, enterprise web serving, and high-throughput caching layers.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F80amds_v7 is an 80-vCPU memory-intensive virtual machine featuring an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, 640 GB of RAM, and 9449 GB of local storage for demanding database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F80amds_v7 is an 80-vCPU memory-optimized server with 640 GB RAM, 9449 GB local storage, and top-tier database performance.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring eighty dedicated AMD EPYC cores, massive local storage, and top-tier database processing capabilities.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 80 dedicated physical cores
Equipped with 640.0 GB of system memory and 9449 GB of local storage
Top-tier performance in CPU, memory bandwidth, and database benchmarks
Supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration
Best suited for memory-intensive databases, Redis caching, and large-scale data processing
